most_effective_strategies.strategy: Graph Strategy: We are at the very beginning of the investigation with no data collected. The most important gap is basic situational awareness: what tweets, accounts, media, and conversations exist about "bridge creation test" (and close variants). We should (1) discover recent and high-visibility posts about bridge creation tests, (2) collect media evidence (photos/videos) that show the test, and (3) identify the authoritative or active accounts to profile and track. To satisfy the CRITICAL REQUIREMENTS, this plan uses multiple endpoint types (search, trends, timeline) so results will be complementary and enable rapid follow-on network and conversation queries.
